reason: The Coin Metrics community GitHub CSV feed (https://raw.githubusercontent.com/coinmetrics/data/master/csv/{asset}.csv) has been frozen since 2026-05-23. Entry 004 could not be generated on 2026-07-09 or 2026-07-18 because the freshness guard in registry/update_registry.py correctly refused to duplicate entry 003's observation date. Incident documented in README > Integrity (2026-07-09).

new_source.note: Same provider (Coin Metrics) and same metrics (CapMVRVCur, PriceUSD) as the prior source — only the delivery channel changes. The frozen rule (z(MVRV) < -0.5 -> LONG, 26-week evaluation) is unaffected.
